turns.question: Good morning, thank you for coming in today.
turns.answer: Of course, thank you for having me -- I've been looking forward to this.

turns.question: It's a pleasure to finally meet you in person after all our emails.
turns.answer: Likewise, it's nice to put a face to the name at last.

turns.question: I hope you found the office without any trouble this morning.
turns.answer: No trouble at all, your directions were very clear, thank you.

turns.question: Wonderful. I trust your flight in went smoothly as well?
turns.answer: It did, thank you, quite smooth all things considered.

turns.question: Glad to hear it. Can I get you anything before we begin, coffee or water?
turns.answer: Just some water would be great, thank you.

turns.question: Of course, one moment. Please have a seat wherever is comfortable.
turns.answer: Thank you, this spot near the window looks perfect.

turns.question: Wonderful, shall we get started with the agenda then?
turns.answer: Yes, whenever you're ready, I'm all set.

turns.question: Welcome aboard, we're all glad to have you join the team.
turns.answer: Thank you, I'm genuinely excited to get started here.

turns.question: I hope you're settling into the new role well so far.
turns.answer: I am, thank you, everyone's been incredibly welcoming.

turns.question: Good to hear. Would you like me to introduce you to the rest of the team?
turns.answer: Please, I'd really love to meet everyone properly.

turns.question: Of course, let's start with the folks on the third floor.
turns.answer: Sounds great, lead the way whenever you're ready.

turns.question: This is our design lead -- she'll be working closely with you.
turns.answer: Wonderful, I've heard great things already, nice to meet you.

turns.question: I'll leave you two to chat, and I'll check back in a bit.
turns.answer: Thank you so much for the introduction, I appreciate it.

turns.question: Good afternoon, I believe we spoke briefly on the phone last week.
turns.answer: Yes, that's right, it's nice to finally meet in person.

turns.question: Likewise. Thank you for your flexibility in rescheduling our call.
turns.answer: Not a problem at all, I understand things come up.

turns.question: I appreciate your understanding. Shall I walk you through the proposal?
turns.answer: Yes, please, that would be very helpful.

turns.question: Of course. We're quite excited about the direction this project is heading.
turns.answer: As are we, it's been a pleasure collaborating so far.

turns.question: We're glad to hear that. Thank you for your continued support on this.
turns.answer: Of course, we're glad to be part of it from the start.

turns.question: Wonderful, well, thank you again for making the trip out here today.
turns.answer: It was truly our pleasure, thank you for the warm welcome.
